title: [EN] Content & innovation providers — the product unbundling

label.zh: 内容与创新提供方(英文版)

description.en: Mobilizy (Austria, location-based mobile travel guides) and tat (Sweden, advanced mobile UI). Small creative shops that license innovation to telcos. Economic engine is speed and IP.
description.zh: Mobilizy(奥地利,基于位置的移动旅行指南)和 tat(瑞典,高级移动 UI)。小型创意公司,把创新授权给运营商。经济引擎是速度和知识产权。
